signal_title: Aprovação da Agenda Regulatória 2025-2026 pela ANPD
risk_rationale: The regulatory guidance from ANPD focuses on international data transfers and data localization, which may require adjustments to TikTok's current data residency and transfer mechanisms in Brazil. The risk is moderate as it aligns with existing compliance efforts but may necessitate additional measures.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Specific requirements for international data transfers as per ANPD's new agenda
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The new regulatory agenda may introduce specific requirements for data transfers that are not covered by the current EU-US framework and SCCs.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Potential new localization requirements for Brazilian data
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The agenda suggests a focus on data localization which may require ensuring Brazilian data is stored and accessed locally.

remediations.title: Enhance Data Transfer Compliance for Brazil
remediations.description: Review and potentially update data transfer mechanisms to align with ANPD's new regulatory agenda, ensuring compliance with any specific requirements for international data transfers.
acceptance_criteria: Updated data transfer protocols for Brazil
Compliance with ANPD's international data transfer requirements

remediations.title: Implement Brazilian Data Localization Measures
remediations.description: Evaluate the need for local data storage solutions in Brazil and implement necessary infrastructure to comply with potential data localization requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Local data storage for Brazilian user data
Compliance with ANPD's data localization requirements

business_impact: Potential increase in operational costs due to the need for local data infrastructure and adjustments to data transfer protocols. However, compliance will ensure continued operation in the Brazilian market.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed legal analysis of ANPD's new agenda to identify specific compliance requirements.
Initiate a project to assess and implement necessary changes to data transfer and localization practices.
Engage with local legal and regulatory experts to ensure alignment with Brazilian data protection laws.
